stocks.name: Cognizant Technology Solutions

crash.reason: 'SaaSpocalypse' AI-deflation panic hit IT services hardest; Berenberg downgrade framed Cognizant as lacking a differentiated mix vs. Accenture. Market pricing structural decline not visible in reported numbers.

fundamentals.valuation: P/E 11.5 (9.1 fwd) · P/S 1.18 · 4.8x fwd EV/EBITDA · ~3% div yield · net cash +$425M

stocks.catalyst: 2026 buyback doubled to $2B (~11% of mcap); CEO says price 'significantly undervalues' prospects; director open-market buy (Jun 10). Q2 earnings 2026-07-29 — any revenue stabilization forces a re-rate from ~9x.

plan.thesisBreak: Organic revenue decline >3% YoY with guidance cut at Q2 print.

stocks.name: Salesforce, Inc.

crash.reason: 'SaaSpocalypse' fear that AI agents obsolete SaaS — despite Agentforce ARR of $1.2B growing +205% YoY. Record 13-day losing streak = capitulation; price has since based +13% off the low on volume.

fundamentals.valuation: P/E ~19 · P/FCF 11.9 vs 25–30x historical · FCF yield ~9%. Current ratio miss is a deferred-revenue artifact (~$19B prepaid subs), not a liquidity issue.

stocks.catalyst: $25B buyback retiring ~10% of shares; Agentforce ARR compounding >200% collides with the bear narrative every quarter; Guggenheim upgrade post-selloff; consensus target ~$257.

plan.thesisBreak: cRPO growth < ~5% YoY or first YoY FCF decline — AI attrition confirmed.

stocks.name: Xiaomi Corporation

crash.reason: Two-front panic: memory cost super-cycle (memory ~+100% YoY, now 30–40% of handset BOM vs 10–15% norm) compressing phone margins, plus RMB 3.1B Q1 EV operating loss. Weekly RSI deeply oversold; least 'based' of the three — qualifies via RSI branch, not consolidation.

fundamentals.valuation: P/E 17 TTM (core ex-EV far cheaper) · P/S 1.65 · net margin 9.1% · DCF fair value ~HK$28.96

stocks.catalyst: HK$4B automatic buyback (launched 2026-06-18) under expanded HK$20B plan; EV inflection: 30k+ deliveries/mo for 3 straight months, 550k FY26 target (+34% YoY), 4 new models; memory-cost cycle mean-reversion in H2 = direct margin catalyst. Consensus: Buy, avg target HK$39.78.

plan.entry: HK$19 – 22, staged in thirds (confirm 2–3 wks basing above HK$21)
plan.thesisBreak: EV losses widening while deliveries stall <25k/mo, or phone gross margin < ~8%.
